description_long: This stool is a simple, block-shaped object with a pixelated wood grain texture reminiscent of digital or voxel art styles. The surface features a pattern of various brown and tan rectangles, simulating the appearance of natural wood planks with a stylized, geometric twist. All sides, including the top, display this consistent wood pattern, with the top face showing a subtle concentric square motif. The edges are sharp and the form is perfectly cubic, lacking any visible joints, fasteners, or additional components. There are no visible legs, backrest, or footrest, indicating a monolithic construction. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for public or outdoor urban environments.
description: A cubic stool with a pixelated wood grain pattern in shades of brown and tan, featuring a simple, blocky design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, pixelated wood grain face with a mix of dark and light brown rectangles.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with the same wood grain pattern and color distribution.
description_view_2: Another side view, maintaining the consistent pixelated wood texture and cubic form.
description_view_3: Back view mirrors the other sides, with no distinguishing features or components.
